headline: Chevron (CVX) Launches AI Data Center Power Venture And Extends Australia Gas Supply
summary: Chevron (NYSE:CVX) has launched a new business with GE Vernova and Microsoft to supply natural gas power to AI data centers. The company has also signed a five year extension to supply natural gas to Alinta Energy in Western Australia. Chevron is best known for its oil and gas production. This new move into powering AI data centers links its existing natural gas operations with a fast growing digital infrastructure sector. The partnership with GE Vernova and Microsoft positions Chevron...
